calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sharon Raintre (Spanish Interpreter). No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court indicated that Proof of Service is not filed and no Request to Continue Hearing Date is submitted. The matter is taken off calendar and dismissed.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Aug-08-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emma Castro (Petitioner in Pro Per). Marie Surber (Sister).

The Respondent has not been served. Mrs. Castro's Request to Continue Hearing is granted (order for the same signed in open court). The Request for Restraining Order was continued to August 8, 2012 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR#5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.
